pi_items.source: Verified against task.json description (lines 3-5), setup_task.sh (lines 11-12), export_result.sh (lines 34-35), and verifier.py (lines 84-85). All files reference these exact paths.

Code analysis of verifier.py lines 99 and 105 shows actual size validation is: before_stats.get('size', 0) > 5000 and after_stats.get('size', 0) > 5000. The metadata claims 10000 but implementation uses 5000.

privileged_info_summary: The task is an interactive GUI benchmark using real GCompris-qt educational software (Ubuntu package, not synthetic). Expected output files are /tmp/clock_before.png and /tmp/clock_after.png, which are verified against task description and all scripts. However, the minimum image size threshold is contradicted: metadata claims 10000 bytes but verifier.py actually checks for > 5000 bytes for both before and after screenshots.
